summary: The notebook currently contains two notes: a course note on gradient descent and a reading note on the Transformer paper, spanning machine-learning foundations and deep-learning architecture.

areas.label: Machine Learning
areas.coverage: Covers gradient descent as an optimization baseline, including the update rule, a worked quadratic example, and learning-rate failure modes.
areas.gap: Only one ml-foundations note exists; broader course topics like momentum, Adam, and other optimizers referenced in the note are not yet written.

areas.label: Deep Learning
areas.coverage: Covers the Transformer architecture: scaled dot-product attention, multi-head attention, positional encodings, and WMT 2014 translation results.
areas.gap: Follow-up topics mentioned as improvements—sub-quadratic attention, better positional schemes, and training-stability recipes—are not yet covered by dedicated notes.
